welcome.title: Find Your Way
welcome.subtitle: The Ultimate Faith Quest
welcome.description: Join an exciting treasure hunt with a faith theme. Work together as a team, solve tasks and collect points!
welcome.step1: Create a team: Enter a name and choose an icon
welcome.step2: Complete stations: Solve tasks and collect points
welcome.step4: Final: After 2 hours you'll see your rank
welcome.rememberCode: Remember team code: To login on other devices
welcome.useChat: Use chat: Ask the admin if you have questions
welcome.footer: Have fun playing! If you have questions, ask the admin in the chat.

setup.title: Create Team
setup.error: Server not reachable. Is the backend running?

pinDisplay.title: Your Team Code
pinDisplay.description: Remember this code! You can use it to login on any device if the browser is closed.
pinDisplay.tip: Tip: Take a photo of this code 📸

hints.start: You're at the start – let's go! Look for the easiest stations first.
hints.progress1: Well done! Tip: Active stations give more points – dare to try!
hints.progress2: Halfway there! Check which stations are still open and plan your route.
hints.progress3: Almost done! Just a few stations left – give it your all!
hints.progress4: Incredible! One more station – you're true champions!

holymoji.title: Holymoji
holymoji.description: Guess biblical terms and stories – only shown with emojis.
holymoji.instructions: Look at the emoji sequences and guess which biblical story or term is meant. You have 5 minutes. Find at least 8 out of 10 correctly to get the code.

geoguesser.title: Geoguesser
geoguesser.description: Recognize where in the world these biblical places are located based on images.
geoguesser.instructions: You will be shown 6 images of biblical places. Assign them to the correct countries/regions. At least 5 correct = Code!

fakeOrFact.title: Fake or Fact
fakeOrFact.description: True or false? Evaluate crazy statements about the Bible together.
fakeOrFact.instructions: The supervisor reads you 10 statements. Decide as a team: True or False? At least 7 correct = Confirmation!

davidAndGoliath.title: David and Goliath
davidAndGoliath.description: Face the challenge: Small vs. Big – who has the courage?
davidAndGoliath.instructions: One team member (David) must throw 3 balls into a bucket 5 meters away. At least 2 hits = Confirmation!

anchorOfHope.title: Anchor of Hope
anchorOfHope.description: Find the hidden anchor and decipher the message of hope.
anchorOfHope.instructions: Search at this station for a hidden anchor. When you find it, you can read the message underneath and get the code.

krugeOfKana.title: Jugs of Cana
krugeOfKana.description: Fill the jugs together – a task that requires teamwork and faith.
krugeOfKana.instructions: You have 3 jugs and must fill them with water – but only with teamwork! The supervisor will explain the exact task on site.

lochkarte.title: Punch Card
lochkarte.description: Hold the punch card up to the light and read the hidden message.
lochkarte.instructions: Take the punch card and hold it up to the light. The holes show you letters – put them together and get the code.

heiligeBuchstabenjagd.title: Holy Letter Hunt
heiligeBuchstabenjagd.description: Search for hidden letters and put them together to form the correct Bible verse.
heiligeBuchstabenjagd.instructions: At this station there are hidden letters. Find all 8 letters and put them together to form the correct Bible verse. The code is the solution word!

glaubenssprung.title: Leap of Faith
glaubenssprung.description: Trust each other blindly – one team member jumps, the others catch.
glaubenssprung.instructions: One team member is blindfolded and jumps from a 1m high platform. The others must catch him. Safe landing = Confirmation!

guterHirte.title: The Good Shepherd
guterHirte.description: Guide your 'sheep' (blindfolded) safely through the course.
guterHirte.instructions: One team member is blindfolded (the sheep). The others guide him only by voice through a course. Reach the goal = Confirmation!

werBinIch.title: Who Am I / Tableau
werBinIch.description: Represent a biblical person as a tableau – others guess who it is.
werBinIch.instructions: Your team represents a biblical person as a tableau (no words!). The supervisor guesses – if he guesses correctly, you get the code.

spellingBee.title: Spelling Bee
spellingBee.description: Sign language puzzle: Watch videos and guess the 5 words.
spellingBee.instructions: Open the Spelling Bee page, login with your PIN and guess the 5 words from the sign language videos. When all are correct, you get the code!

spellingBee.title: Spelling Bee
spellingBee.subtitle: Sign Language Puzzle · 5 Videos
spellingBee.step2: Recognize the signs using the printed alphabet
spellingBee.step4: When all are correct, the code appears
spellingBee.enterInApp: Enter this code in the app!
spellingBee.loginDescription: Login with your team PIN to play Spelling Bee.
spellingBee.pinReminder: Your team PIN was given to you during registration.

admin.title: Admin – Find Your Way
admin.gameDurationHelp: How long should the game last in total?
admin.reminderIntervalHelp: How often should reminders be displayed?
